summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations planned. Non-security open PRs are kept as independent active PRs needing their normal maintainer/proof/review paths; security-sensitive PRs are routed to central OpenClaw security handling; already closed candidates are recorded as skipped keep-closed context.

actions.reason: Open WhatsApp refactor PR with live proof/check signal should remain on its own maintainer-review path.
Open maintainer PR with review/check blockers is independent; merge and fix are blocked by job frontmatter and current evidence.
Draft Cohere provider onboarding PR is active independent work; keep open for author/maintainer follow-up.
Gateway origin allowlist/security-boundary PR is out of ProjectClownfish backlog-cleanup scope and should be handled by central OpenClaw security review.
Candidate is already closed; no plan-mode mutation applies.
Open plugin API PR is distinct work and should stay open for maintainer/review follow-up rather than inventory closeout.
Open custom provider metadata PR is independent active feature work and should remain on normal author/maintainer follow-up.
Even though already closed, the candidate is explicitly security-sensitive and should remain routed to central security handling for any further review.
Open dashboard reconnect reliability PR is independent active work and should stay open for proof/maintainer review.
Auth store sealing and gateway hardening PR contains security-sensitive review findings and belongs in central OpenClaw security handling.
